zh.lifeSummary: 當Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille於1027年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉時，她的父親Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille24歲，母親Judith de Nantes32歲。她於大約1040年與Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1078年1月13日在她的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille于1027年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉时，她的父亲Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille24岁，母亲Judith de Nantes32岁。她于大约1040年与Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1078年1月13日在她的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: ou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille was born in 1027, in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, was 24 and her mother, Judith de Nantes, was 32. She married Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne about 1040. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 13 January 1078, in her hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille est née en 1027, à Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Judith de Nantes, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne environ 1040. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 janvier 1078, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille 1027 in Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille 24 und ihre Mutter Judith de Nantes 32. Sie hat um 1040 Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. Januar 1078 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille è nata il nel 1027 nel Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Judith de Nantes, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne circa 1040. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 gennaio 1078, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouailleが1027年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインで生まれた時，父Alain III Craignart de Cornouailleは24歳，母Judith de Nantesは32歳であった。約1040年にEudes de Penthievre de Bretagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1078年1月13日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille(이)가 1027년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith de Nantes(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1040년 Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1078년 1월 13일 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille nasceu em 1027, em Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Nantes, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne aproximadamente 1040. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1078, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille родилась в 1027 г. в местности илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Judith de Nantes, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne около 1040 г. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 января 1078 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille nació en 1027, en Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alain III Craignart de Cornouaille, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Judith de Nantes, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne aproximadamente 1040. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de enero de 1078, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
